name: 诅咒结界规则
description: 每回合限一次，己方回合受到伤害时免疫并将诅咒交给对手
skillCode: const piece = context.rulePiece; const damageAmount = context.damage; const currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; const pieceOwnerId = piece.ownerPlayerId; if (currentPlayerId !== pieceOwnerId) return { success: false }; if (!piece.statusTags) piece.statusTags = []; const usedThisTurn = piece.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'curse-ward-used'; }); if (usedThisTurn) return { success: false }; piece.statusTags.push({ id: 'curse-ward-used-' + Date.now(), type: 'curse-ward-used', name: '诅咒结界已使用', remainingDuration: 1 }); const opponentPlayer = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId !== pieceOwnerId; }); if (opponentPlayer) { const curseCardId = 'rafaam-curse-' + Date.now(); if (!battle.customCards) battle.customCards = {}; battle.customCards[curseCardId] = { id: curseCardId, name: '诅咒(' + damageAmount + ')', description: '持有时每回合结束对一个随机友方棋子造成' + damageAmount + '点伤害。消耗2AP打出以弃置此牌。', type: 'reactive', trigger: { type: 'endTurn' }, icon: '💀', actionPointCost: 2, damageAmount: damageAmount, code: 'function executeCard(context) { if (battle.turn.currentPlayerId !== playerId) return { success: false }; var friendlyPieces = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId === playerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (friendlyPieces.length === 0) return { success: false }; var target = friendlyPieces[Math.floor(Math.random() * friendlyPieces.length)]; var cardData = battle.customCards && battle.customCards[context.card.id]; var dmg = (cardData && cardData.damageAmount) ? cardData.damageAmount : 4; var dmgResult = dealDamage(target, target, dmg, "magical", battle, "curse-end-turn"); return { success: true, keepInHand: true, message: "诅咒对" + target.name + "造成了" + dmgResult.damage + "点伤害" }; }' }; addCardToHand(curseCardId, opponentPlayer.playerId); } return { success: true, blocked: true, message: piece.name + '的诅咒结界触发，免疫了' + damageAmount + '点伤害并将诅咒交给了对手' };
